goal: Wire PenaltyRule config into LoanBatchServiceImpl so overdue loans automatically receive penalties based on FLAT/PERCENTAGE rules with compounding and idempotency

tasks.name: Add ConfigService Penalty Lookup
tasks.action: Add getActivePenaltyRuleByType(PenaltyType) method to ConfigService interface and implementation. Delegates to penaltyRuleRepository.findByPenaltyTypeAndActiveTrue(), returns first result or Optional.empty().

tasks.name: Wire Auto-Penalty into LoanBatchServiceImpl
tasks.action: Inject LoanPenaltyService, ConfigService, LoanPenaltyRepository. Replace hardcoded 30/90-day thresholds with SystemConfig values. In penalty detection block: fetch active LOAN_DEFAULT PenaltyRule, check idempotency via scheduleId, calculate FLAT or PERCENTAGE amount, call applyPenalty with scheduleId, update LoanApplication.totalPenalties.

tasks.name: Update LoanPenaltyService for scheduleId Support
tasks.action: Add overloaded applyPenalty with scheduleId parameter. Add getUnpaidPenalties(UUID loanId) and getTotalUnpaidPenalties(UUID loanId) methods.

commitMessage: feat(loan-penalty): auto-apply penalties via PenaltyRule in batch processing
